---
name: Feature request
about: Propose something new for Spotlight
labels: enhancement
---

## What do you want Spotlight to do?

One-sentence summary.

## What problem does it solve?

Who benefits, and how does this improve investigations today? Concrete examples beat abstract "it would be nice" framing.

## Proposed shape

Which part of Spotlight does this touch?

- [ ] A new skill (methodology)
- [ ] A new integration (external tool with API)
- [ ] A new feed source (monitoring)
- [ ] A new runtime adapter
- [ ] Change to an existing skill / agent
- [ ] setup.html / landing.html / review.html
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

If you've thought about implementation, sketch it. See `CONTRIBUTING.md` for the drop-in patterns.

## Alternatives considered

Existing tools that do something similar, and why they don't fit.

## Scope check

- [ ] I've read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and understand the subsystem this touches.
- [ ] This preserves the "runtime-agnostic" principle (works across pi, Claude, Codex, etc.).
- [ ] I've thought about the sensitive-mode implications (if applicable).
